title: Project Metadata, Assets, PyInstaller 6.21, Platforms, and Clean Launch · Program Brief: Platform Matrix
summary: The game depends on the current directory, omits fonts and sound, builds one executable on Linux and calls it cross-platform, lacks licenses, and is never installed fresh. Predict player-visible behavior, state, units, timing, input, rendering, feedback, failure, accessibility, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the platform matrix increment in portable inspected game release candidate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, change…
objectives: Test supported OS, architecture, scaling, display, audio, input, permissions, offline, locale, and clean-profile combinations.
Build with PyInstaller on each target OS, inspect analysis and contents, handle data and native libraries, and test one-folder before one-file.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Predict Platform Matrix · Theory Platform Matrix
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Asteroids team handles case 3900 during a controller-remapping accessibility review. Build deterministic Python evidence to package code and licensed assets from an identified revision and prove clean offline launch on supported platforms; preserve explicit pixels, seconds, radians or degrees, frames, entity counts, collision units, and budgets; then lose window focus while thrust and fire are held, then prove both actions release safely. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Test supported OS, architecture, scaling, display, audio, input, permissions, offline, locale, and clean-profile combinations.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example Asteroids team handles case 3900 during a controller-remapping accessibility review. Build deterministic Python evidence to package code and licensed assets from an identified revision and prove clean offline launch on supported platforms; preserve explicit pixels, seconds, radians or degrees, frames, entity counts, collision units, and budgets; then lose window focus while thrust and fire are held, then prove both actions release safely. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Test supported OS, architecture, scaling, display, audio, input, permissions, offline, locale, and clean-profile combinations. A defensible solution applies Platform Matrix, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to portable inspected game release candidate.

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-worked-asteroids-packaging-assets-platforms-4
# Competency: asteroids-worked-asteroids-packaging-assets-platforms-4.
# Case 1655: a low-vision laptop playtest at 125 percent scaling.
# Operating constraint: test empty, zero-vector, seam, low-frame-rate, focus-loss, device-loss, missing-asset, corrupted-save, and rejected cases.
# Changed case: inject a 400 millisecond frame stall and prove the update budget prevents a spiral of death.
def worked_asteroids_packaging_assets_platforms_4(target_platforms: int = 3, clean_installs: int = 3, declared_assets: int = 12, packaged_assets: int = 12, licenses_recorded: bool = True, offline_launch: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "playerworked4",
        "seed1655",
        "input4dekrow",
        "frameworked41655",
        "state1655worked4",
        "playtest4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if target_platforms < 1 or clean_installs < 0:
        return False, target_platforms, "package-domain"
    if clean_installs != target_platforms:
        return False, clean_installs, "platform-gap"
    if packaged_assets != declared_assets:
        return False, packaged_assets, "asset-gap"
    if not licenses_recorded or not offline_launch:
        return False, packaged_assets, "release-input"
    assert packaged_assets == declared_assets
    return True, target_platforms, "portable-build"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic pure-Python Asteroids decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected frame, input, seam, collision, cue, save, package, or release case, then state which native pygame-ce, SDL, display, controller, audio, filesystem, GPU, accessibility playtest, installer, performance, recovery, or publication claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.

# Evidence: asteroids-platform-matrix-l59890
# Competency: asteroids-platform-matrix.

steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Platform Matrix: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory Asteroids team handles case 3518 during a low-power integrated-GPU frame-budget trial. Build deterministic Python evidence to package code and licensed assets from an identified revision and prove clean offline launch on supported platforms; record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then lose window focus while thrust and fire are held, then prove both actions release safely. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Test supported OS, architecture, scaling, display, audio, input, permissions, offline, locale, and clean-profile combinations.
